Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Checklist Completed occurs in the entire event log
Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that are immediately followed by SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed appearing in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that occur after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed over SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed events that appear in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Percentage of variants containing SW-Checklist Completed that also include at least one reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed occurring without any preceding reminder activities (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' does not happen

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that are part of variants ending in an acceptance decision (e.g., RW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed events that directly enable progression to editor assignment (i.e., followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-Awaiting AE Assignment)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Checklist Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed relative to Manuscript Export Succeeded across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed appearing in variants that involve Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that occur within 24 hours of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist in rejected cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'
